display_text: Axe Aghanim's Scepter: Removes Counter Helix cooldown and applies a stacking debuff that reduces enemy attack damage. This upgrade counters physical damage-heavy lineups, transforming Axe into a durable tank that punishes sustained attacks and thrives in prolonged fights.
search_text: Axe Aghanim Scepter Counter Helix physical damage reduction no cooldown stacking debuff tank

display_text: Axe Aghanim's Shard: Allows Battle Hunger to stack on a single target, amplifying its damage and slow effects. This upgrade counters mobility and sustain, enabling Axe to disrupt key targets more effectively and apply consistent pressure in lane or teamfights.
search_text: Axe Aghanim Shard Battle Hunger stack damage slow mobility sustain disrupt
